title: hive**, the **Prompt Library**, and the **Automation Scheduler** (detailed later
content: hive**, the **Prompt Library**, and the **Automation Scheduler** (detailed later in technical sections). Each module is not an isolated tool but an organ in a living system: they communicate via prompts and files, and each state change is reflected as part of the ongoing story. **Wave Theory** informs the system’s operational rhythm: tasks are organized into iterative cycles (waves) of generation, review, and refinement, rather than one-off executions. This approach mirrors human creative processes of drafting and revising, providing adaptive feedback loops [oai_citation:4‡noailabs.medium.com](https://noailabs.medium.com/self-evolving-agents-the-ultimate-frontier-in-artificial-intelligence-7b7842c1f472#:~:text=,informed%20by%20a%20retrieval%20mechanism). Thus, the system is designed for continual learning and adaptation, aligning with the emerging paradigm of AI systems that **continuously adapt and improve through interactions and feedback** [oai_citation:5‡noailabs.medium.com](https://noailabs.medium.com/self-evolving-agents-the-ultimate-frontier-in-artificial-intelligence-7b7842c1f472#:~:text=Self,interactions%2C%20feedback%2C%20and%20environmental%20changes).
